title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, push models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain adapter to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in chains & agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; multi-user, model manager, code highlighting, RAG.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, embeddings, list/pull/delete models.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Official Ruby gem for Ollama; simple interface to chat, generate, embed, and manage models.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with coloured output, history, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot plugin that proxies to a local Ollama model instead of OpenAI.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official Docker image and compose examples for running Ollama server + GPU support in containers.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling, PVC, and optional GPU node pools.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that chats in channels/threads using any Ollama model with slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Lightweight Slack bot server that answers app-mentions with streaming responses from Ollama.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package for interacting with the Ollama API; same feature set as the Python client.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package providing Python bindings to chat, generate, embed, pull, push, list models.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG starter using Ollama embeddings + Chroma to chat with local PDFs and Markdown.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a sidebar chat powered by any local Ollama model and vault context.

title: ollama-logseq
summary: Logseq plugin to query and chat with your knowledge base via a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-maintained Rust crate providing strongly-typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.
